T0046.title: Exploit
T0046.definition: A vulnerability or weak spot in a credit approval workflow or risk-control system that can be exploited for fraudulent gain.
T0046.description: Underground operators specialize in reverse-engineering financial platforms’ review mechanisms to identify gaps, such as lax document verification or system response delays. Once a viable loophole is discovered, they mobilize teams to attack it at scale, batch-obtaining loans through forged documents and fake transactions. Information about these vulnerabilities is traded at high prices within closed fraud communities and spreads rapidly.
T0046.usageExample: That newly launched consumer loan product has a loose loophole—no in-person interview required. Get people on it now.

references.title: 2024 H1 Credit Fraud Risk Landscape Report
Black Market Big Data: Exposing Malicious Loan Brokers
